name: @guardagent/circle-public-rpc-adapter
description: A Circle Wallets adapter for Bridge Kit / Gateway / Swap / Earn that reads on-chain state via a public RPC instead of Circle's Smart Contract Platform Query Contract API - so Arc and other accounts without the SCP entitlement (HTTP 403) can still bridge, deposit, spend, and swap. Writes still go through Circle developer-controlled-wallets.
